channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  5. One Charger for iPhone, AirPods, and Apple Watch for Less, Anker's MagSafe Foldable Charger at All-Time Low for a Few More Hours  Gizmodo

item.title: The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape, but that's far from the whole story - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape, but that's far from the whole story  Eurogamer
  2. AMD engineer builds a Steam Machine competitor with a 3D printer, has an RTX 5060 inside  TweakTown
  3. Steam Machine Who? Retailers and Modders Are Building More Powerful Compact PCs For the Same Price  extremetech.com
  4. We made a DIY Steam Machine build cheaper than Valve's, with some help from Amazon Prime Day deals  PC Guide
  5. LDLC "PC Box" Targets Steam Machine Pricing with RDNA 4 Performance  TechPowerUp

item.title: With Star Wars: Galactic Racer, former Burnout devs have built on N64 and PS2 classics to make what they call "the purest expression of gaming" - Eurogamer

item.title: South of Midnight studio Compulsion Games are allowing staff to openly seek new jobs ahead of possible Xbox layoffs, according to report - Rock Paper Shotgun
